acceptance_criteria.text: Generated Template_3 workbooks rewrite 2_FRAME_MARKUP scene_description formulas so blank raw transcript cells render as blank strings, not Excel 0.

proof.command: Formula rewrite helper check via python stdin.
proof.summary: Rows C4:C6 were rewritten to IF(raw="","",raw) formulas.

proof.command: Synthetic workbook generation with blank transcript segments.
proof.summary: Generated 2_FRAME_MARKUP formulas use blank-safe IF references for blank raw scene_description cells.

acceptance_criteria.text: Rows with transcript text still display the transcript text by referencing 1_RAW_CORRELATIONS!C*.

proof.command: Synthetic workbook generation with one populated transcript segment.
proof.summary: 1_RAW_CORRELATIONS!C5 contained transcript text and 2_FRAME_MARKUP!C5 referenced it through the IF formula.

acceptance_criteria.text: The change applies to every generated data row, including reports with fewer or more than the template's default 20 rows.

proof.command: Synthetic short and extended workbook generation.
proof.summary: Rows C4:C6 were rewritten for a short workbook, C7 remained cleared, and C24 was rewritten for a 21-row workbook.

acceptance_criteria.text: Transcript generation, scoring, frame images, markup flags, and unrelated workbook formulas are unchanged.

proof.summary: Implementation is scoped to Template_3 scene-description formulas after row fitting.

acceptance_criteria.text: Focused checks prove Python syntax, generated formula structure, workbook generation, and diff hygiene.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: Run formula rewrite helper check for _rewrite_markup_scene_formulas.
Generate a short Template_3 workbook with blank/populated transcript segments and inspect 2_FRAME_MARKUP!C4:C7.
Generate a 21-row Template_3 workbook and inspect 2_FRAME_MARKUP!C24.
known_gaps: Excel formula recalculation itself was not evaluated in desktop Excel/LibreOffice; generated formulas were inspected structurally.
